summary: Comprehensive frontend testing completed for Meetings.ro bilingual landing page. All core functionality including route-based language switching, navigation, CTAs, pricing display, mobile responsiveness, and FAQ accordion working correctly.
passed_tests: Root route redirects correctly to language route (/en by default)
/ro route renders full Romanian landing page with correct content
/en route renders full English landing page with correct content
Desktop language toggle switches between RO and EN routes correctly
Language preference persists after route switching and page refresh
Per-route metadata/title updates correctly for both RO and EN
Header navigation anchors scroll to Features, 9 fields, Pricing, Trust, FAQ sections
All primary CTA buttons link to correct app URL (gal-transcribe.preview.emergentagent.com)
Pricing cards display exact confirmed monthly plans: Free $0, Basic $175, Full $250
Mobile navigation menu opens and all CTAs/anchors remain usable on mobile viewport
FAQ accordion expands and collapses correctly
No broken layout or overlap on desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844) viewports
Hero, pricing, and footer sections render correctly across all screen sizes
Responsive design works properly on tablet viewport (768x1024)
Mobile language toggle functionality works correctly
All navigation links and CTA buttons are properly accessible with data-testid attributes
